name: Cash Store
description_short: Cash Store offers in-store installment loans in Houston with same-day funding. Bad and no-credit applicants are considered; pre-qualify online and complete in-store.
description_long:
Cash Store is a small-dollar installment loan provider operating physical retail locations across Texas and other states. The Houston location at 19734 Tomball Pkwy serves customers seeking quick access to cash through unsecured installment loans. Customers can initiate the process online via a pre-qualification form, then visit the store to complete their application, undergo underwriting, and potentially receive funds the same day.

The primary product is the installment loan — an unsecured loan repaid on a fixed schedule over time. Cash Store also offers the Netspend Prepaid Mastercard, a reloadable card that functions like a debit card without requiring a traditional bank account. Existing borrowers can refinance or re-loan over the phone without visiting the store, a feature the company calls Retail Remote Refis & Reloans.

What sets this location apart from online-only lenders is the in-store service model. Staff walk applicants through the process, answer questions, and handle documentation on-site. The Houston branch carries a 4.9-star Google rating from 208 reviews, with reviewers repeatedly naming specific associates by name — Janelle, Marlene, and Marlen — suggesting consistent, personalized service. Funding, when approved, is typically disbursed the same day.

Cash Store is a high-cost lending option. Rates, fees, and maximum loan amounts are not disclosed on the website and are determined individually through underwriting based on income, credit, and other factors. The in-store-only completion requirement limits accessibility for those without transportation. Borrowers with better credit and stable income will almost certainly find lower-cost alternatives through credit unions or traditional personal loan lenders. This product is best understood as a last-resort or emergency option, not a general-purpose loan.
address: 1700 Precinct Line Rd Ste 100, Hurst, TX 76054

company_info.headquarters: 1700 Precinct Line Rd Ste 100, Hurst, TX 76054

pros: Same-day funding available once application is approved in-store
Online pre-qualification lets applicants check eligibility before visiting
Bad credit and no-credit applicants are considered — credit is a factor but not an automatic disqualifier
4.9-star Google rating from 208 reviews, with consistent praise for named staff members
Existing customers can refinance or re-loan by phone without returning to the store
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard available for customers without a traditional bank account
Staff-assisted in-store process — associates help complete the application and explain terms
cons: Application must be completed in-store — no fully online or remote loan process
Rates, APR, and loan amount ranges are not published; terms only revealed after underwriting
Limited hours (Mon–Fri 10am–6pm, Sat 10am–2pm, closed Sunday) reduce accessibility
Single Houston location shown — not useful for borrowers outside the northwest Houston area
High-cost product by nature of the installment loan segment — not competitive with credit unions or bank personal loans for creditworthy borrowers
best_for: Borrowers with bad or thin credit who have been declined by traditional lenders
Houston-area residents needing same-day cash for an unexpected expense
Unbanked or underbanked consumers who also need a prepaid debit card solution
Existing Cash Store customers looking to refinance or extend a current loan by phone
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for Houston-area borrowers with bad or no credit who need emergency cash quickly and are comfortable completing the process in person. The main caveat is cost transparency — rates and fees are not disclosed upfront, making it impossible to comparison-shop before applying, which is a significant drawback for any cost-conscious borrower.
services: Retail remote refinancing (existing customers, by phone)
Retail remote re-loans (existing customers, by phone)
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard issuance and reloading
In-person customer service for loan questions and term review
